name: 白クリーム
prompt: A ramen bowl seen from top-down 3/4 isometric at 45 degrees. White ceramic bowl with a thin red line around the rim, smooth rounded form. The bowl contains thick creamy white broth — opaque milky white with a slight ivory tint. No toppings, no noodles visible — just the smooth creamy soup surface filling the bowl. The broth has a rich, velvety appearance with subtle surface texture. Pure white background. Bowl fills 75% of frame.
